revision.text:
{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. DePiep --> | sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff<!-- GROUP --> | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff<!-- OCCURRENCE, border. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; no error) --> |={{{default|}}} <!-- DEFAULT --> |#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. DePiep --> | sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff<!-- GROUP --> | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff<!-- OCCURRENCE, border. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; no error) --> |={{{default|}}} <!-- DEFAULT --> |#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. DePiep --> | sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff<!-- GROUP --> | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff<!-- OCCURRENCE, border. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; no error) --> |={{{default|}}} <!-- DEFAULT --> |#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<!--

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. DePiep --> | sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff<!-- GROUP --> | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff<!-- OCCURRENCE, border. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; no error) --> |={{{default|}}} <!-- DEFAULT --> |#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. DePiep --> | sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff<!-- GROUP --> | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff<!-- OCCURRENCE, border. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; {{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; no error) --> |={{{default|}}} <!-- DEFAULT --> |#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Element_color here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Element_color for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}<!-- rm: hyphen, whitespace --> <!-- BLOCK note: per April 2021, block colors s..i-block are also *hardcoded* in [[Template:Infobox element/symbol-to-block/format]] for efficiency. DePiep --> | sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff<!-- GROUP --> | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff<!-- OCCURRENCE, border. Use style= "border:2px solid #4499ff" --> | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent<!-- techical placeholder for border --><!-- S.O.M. / PHASE, font color. Use style= "color:#007000" --> | solid = #000000<!-- black --> | liquid = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #007000 --> | gas = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #cb0000 --> | unknownphase = #000000<!-- 2021-01-23 Emergency blackening b/c bad contrasts, see WT:ELEM#Emergency edit: remove fontcoloring State-of-Matter WAS: #606060 --><!-- TABLE colors --> | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8<!-- CATEGORIES TOP LEVEL --> | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6<!-- ERA (discovery years) --> | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef<!-- METALLOID CITE CLASS --> | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba <!-- SAW standard atomic weight; table bg color --> | sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff<!-- 0/255: 132-30-255 --> | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec<!-- 0/255: 100-30-255 --> <!-- ARTICLE QUALITY grades --> | aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55<!-- adjusted, from 66ff66--> | aqb = #bcff66<!-- adjusted, from b2ff66 --> | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff <!-- WP ARTICLE IMPORTANCE (from template:Importance/colour) --> | imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5 <!-- NUMBER, VALENCE --> | 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed <!-- STRAIGHT COLOR (HTML W3C color def) --> | white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000 <!-- BLANK (no input): return {{{default|}} (could be blank; no error) --> |={{{default|}}} <!-- DEFAULT --> |#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Element_color for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:String| replace| source= {{{1| }}}| pattern= [%s-]| plain= false}}}}
| sblock = #ff9999 | pblock = #fdff8c | dblock = #99ccff | fblock = #9bff99 | gblock = #fd99ff | hblock = #7ed9d9 | iblock = #e0c880 | sblock(predicted) = #ffcccc | pblock(predicted) = #ffffbf | dblock(predicted) = #c7eeff | fblock(predicted) = #cdffcc | gblock(predicted) = #febfff | group18 | noblegas | noblegases = #c0ffff | primordial = 2px solid #6e6e8e | fromdecay = 2px dashed #6e6e8e | synthetic = 2px dotted #6e6e8e | undiscovered = 2px solid transparent | none = 2px solid transparent | solid = #000000 | liquid = #000000 | gas = #000000 | unknownphase = #000000 | table0 | tableborder = #a9a9a9 | table1 | tabletitle | tablecaption = #d8d8d8 | table2 | tableheader = #e0e0e0 | table3 | tablecolheader | tablerowheader | tablesubheader = #e8e8e8 | table4 | tablemark = #f0f0f0 | table5 | tablebackground | tablebg = #f8f8f8 | metal | metals = #eee8aa | metalloid | metalloids = #cccc99 | nonmetal | nonmetals = #b0e0e6 | unknownchemicalproperty | unknownchemicalproperties | unknownproperty | unknownproperties = #e8e8e8 | vanderwaals = #e0b0e6 | smallstructurenonmetal | smallstructurenonmetals = #b0c0e6 | largestructurenonmetal | largestructurenonmetals = #b0e0e6 | antiquitytomiddleages = #ffb9b9 | before1800 = #dfcdff | 1800 | 18001849 = #cbffb9 | 1850 | 18501899 = #b9ffe4 | 1900 | 19001949 = #ffe2b9 | 1950 | 19501999 = #fff6b9 | 2000 | 2000present | 2000present = #ffb9ef | metalloidciteclass1of4 = #baffba | metalloidciteclass2of4 = #badcff | metalloidciteclass3of4 = #ffbadc | metalloidciteclass4of4 = #ffffba
| sawheader = #b0e0e6 | saw = #e1fcff | msiheader = #c3ffd8 | msi = #e1ffec
| aqfa = #6699ff | aqa = #66ffff | aqga = #55cc55 | aqb = #bcff66 | aqc = #ffff66 | aqstart = #ffaa66 | aqstub = #ff6666 | aqlist = #aa88ff
| imptop = #ff00ff | imphigh = #ff88ff | impmid = #ffbbff | implow = #ffddff | impbottom = #ffeeff | imp??? = #f8f9fa | impna | impn/a = #f5f5f5
| 0 | zero = #c0ffff | 1 | one = #ff8989 | 2 | two = #ffdead | 3 | three = #ffbfff | 4 | four = #cccccc | 5 | five = #cccc99 | 6 | six = #a0ffa0 | 7 | seven = #ffff99 | 8 | eight = #d1ddff | 9 | nine = #c6dd9d | unknownvalence = #ededed
| white = #ffffff | black = #000000 | red = #ff0000 | yellow = #ffff00 | blue = #0000ff | green = #008000
|={{{default|}}}
|#default = {{Element color/secondary|1={{{1|}}} |default={{{default|transparent}}} }} }}<noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
